email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
email.too_short: Email must be at least 5 characters
email.already_exists: This email is already registered. Please login instead.
email.in_use: This email address is already in use
email.same_as_current: New email must be different from current email

password.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.no_number: Password must contain at least one number
password.same_as_current: New password must be different from current password

username.invalid_format: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
username.too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters

user.image_invalid_url: Please enter a valid image URL

article.slug_invalid_format: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
article.cover_image_invalid_url: Please enter a valid cover image URL
article.meta_title_too_long: Meta title must not exceed 60 characters
article.meta_description_too_long: Meta description must not exceed 160 characters
article.tags_minimum: Please select at least one tag

tag.name_too_short: Tag name must be at least 2 characters
tag.name_too_long: Tag name must not exceed 50 characters
tag.slug_invalid_format: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
tag.color_invalid_hex: Please enter a valid hex color code

comment.content_too_short: Comment must be at least 1 character

slug.invalid_format: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
slug.too_short: Slug must be at least 3 characters

pagination.page_too_small: Page number must be at least 1

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in to your account

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your details below to create your account
register.password_hint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number
register.success_description: Please login with your new account.
register.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred during registration

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
forgot_password.success_message: If that email exists in our system, we've sent you a password reset link.
forgot_password.success_instruction: Click the link in the email to reset your password. The link will expire in 1 hour.
forgot_password.rate_limit_error: Too many requests. Please try again later.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter your new password below
reset_password.success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.
reset_password.invalid_token: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
reset_password.expired_token: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
reset_password.error_failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.subtitle: Update your password to keep your account secure
change_password.password_hint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
change_password.success_message: Your password has been changed successfully.
change_password.error_message: Please check your current password and try again.
change_password.same_as_current: New password must be different from current password
change_password.error_user_not_found: User not found or password not set

email_change.title: Change Email Address
email_change.subtitle: Update your account email address
email_change.password_hint: We need your password to confirm this change
email_change.success_message: We've sent a verification link to your new email address. Click the link to complete the email change.
email_change.success_instruction: The verification link will expire in 1 hour.
email_change.error_message: Please check your information and try again.
email_change.same_email: New email must be different from current email
email_change.email_in_use: This email address is already in use
email_change.rate_limit_error: Too many email change requests. Please try again later.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.subtitle: Permanently delete your account and data
delete_account.warning_message: This action cannot be undone. Your account will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
delete_account.password_hint: We need your password to confirm this deletion
delete_account.checkbox_label: I understand that this action is permanent
delete_account.success_message: Your account will be permanently deleted in 30 days. You can cancel this within the grace period by logging in.
delete_account.error_message: Please check your information and try again.
delete_account.rate_limit_error: Too many deletion attempts. Please try again later.
delete_account.confirmation_modal_message: Please type CONFIRM to delete your account
delete_account.grace_period_info: You have 30 days to cancel this action by logging in again.

verify_email_change.title: Verify Email Change
verify_email_change.success_message: Your email address has been updated.
verify_email_change.success_instruction: You'll need to sign in again with your new email.
verify_email_change.error_message: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify_email_change.already_used: This verification link has already been used

verify_email.title: Email Verified!
verify_email.verifying_description: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verify_email.subtitle: Your email has been successfully verified.
verify_email.access_features: You now have full access to all features:
verify_email.invalid_link_description: The verification link is invalid or missing.
verify_email.invalid_link_instruction: Please check your email for the correct verification link, or request a new one.
verify_email.failed_subtitle: We couldn't verify your email address.
verify_email.failed_instruction: The link may have expired or already been used. Please request a new verification email.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.heading: 404 - Page Not Found
404.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
404.suggestions: You might want to check the URL or try one of these options:

500.title: Server Error
500.heading: 500 - Server Error
500.description: Oops! Something went wrong on our end.
500.message: We're working on fixing this. Please try again later.

403.title: Access Denied
403.heading: 403 - Access Denied
403.description: You don't have permission to access this resource.
403.message: If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.heading: 429 - Rate Limit Exceeded
429.description: You've made too many requests in a short period.
429.message: Please wait a moment before trying again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_description: You don't have any notifications yet

verification_banner.description: Check your inbox for a verification link to unlock all features.
verification_banner.success_description: Please check your inbox and spam folder.
verification_banner.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.

demo.title: Login Role Demo
demo.subtitle: Choose a role to quickly login and test specialized permissions

descriptions.super_admin: Full system access with all permissions and user management.
descriptions.admin: Manage content, users, and view reports.
descriptions.moderator: Moderate comments and review reported content.
descriptions.user: Standard access to browse and interact with content.
